title: Implement BYOK Proxy for OpenAI Compatibility
description: Develop a Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) proxy to ensure compatibility with OpenAI, allowing users to integrate their own keys seamlessly.
business_req: Enhance compatibility with major AI platforms to increase user adoption.
user_story: As a developer, I want to use my own OpenAI keys so that I can maintain control over my API usage and costs.
validation_notes: The ticket lacks acceptance criteria, related files, technical notes, and change references, making it incomplete and untestable.

user_story: As a non-English speaking user, I want documentation in my language so that I can understand and use the software effectively.

title: Improve CLI Auto-Detection Mechanism
description: Enhance the auto-detection mechanism for coding-agent CLIs to improve reliability and performance.
business_req: Ensure seamless integration and operation of coding-agent CLIs to improve user experience.
user_story: As a developer, I want reliable CLI detection so that I can focus on my work without interruptions.
validation_notes: The ticket lacks specific acceptance criteria, related files, technical notes, and change references.

title: Create Quickstart Guide for New Users
description: Develop a comprehensive quickstart guide to help new users set up and start using Open Design quickly and efficiently.
business_req: Facilitate user onboarding to reduce churn and increase user satisfaction by providing clear and concise setup instructions.
user_story: As a new user, I want a quickstart guide so that I can begin using Open Design without confusion, ensuring a smooth onboarding experience.
acceptance_criteria: The quickstart guide must be available in the root directory as QUICKSTART.md.
The guide should include step-by-step instructions for setting up Open Design with at least one coding-agent CLI.
Instructions must cover both local and web deployment options.
The guide should include troubleshooting tips for common setup issues.
The guide must be translated into at least two other languages available in the repository (e.g., German and Japanese).
The guide should be reviewed and approved by at least one other team member.
technical_notes: Ensure that the quickstart guide is consistent with the existing README and AGENTS documentation. Pay special attention to the setup of the 12 coding-agent CLIs and the integration with the 31 composable Skills and 72 Design Systems. Consider edge cases where users might not have a CLI installed and provide alternative instructions using the OpenAI-compatible BYOK proxy.
validation_notes: The ticket lacks acceptance criteria, related files, technical notes, and change references.

user_story: As a developer, I want automated testing so that I can ensure code quality and deploy updates faster.
